notes: New Wave 12 candidate, discovered via country-hub-data.js gap scan (rule already verified in Wave 9/11 for the country-hub summary, never built as an individual event).
Date rule (weekday-in-range, Mon within May 18-24) confirmed via WebSearch against timeanddate.com/canada.ca — 2026 = May 18.
Competitor check: arabz.ca has a dedicated Arabic article but no countdown, no year-specific date, thin province-exception coverage.
Differentiator: Nova Scotia/Newfoundland exception + Quebec's distinct 'Journée nationale des patriotes' naming, neither covered well by any competitor.
